zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wolcott Sr.於大約1500年出生在英國薩默塞特托藍德時，他的父親William Wolcott27歲，母親Elizabeth Whetchill23歲。他於1516年之前與Margaret Alice Welling在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1572年11月4日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特托藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wolcott Sr.于大约1500年出生在英国薩默塞特托藍德时，他的父亲William Wolcott27岁，母亲Elizabeth Whetchill23岁。他于1516年之前与Margaret Alice Welling在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1572年11月4日在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特托藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Wolcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Surrey): habitational name from Wollacott in Thrushelton (Devon), named from the Old English personal name Wulfnōth + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

History: Henry Wolcott (1578–1655), clothier, came from Tolland, Somerset, England, and settled in Windsor, CT, in 1636. His grandson Roger (1679–1767) was colonial governor of CT; his great-grandson Oliver (1726–1797) was a signer of the Declaration of Independence.

variants.name: Woolcock
meanings: English (Cornwall): probably a variant of   Wolcott  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wolcott Sr. was born about 1500, in Tolland, Somerset, England, his father, William Wolcott, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Whetchill, was 23. He married Margaret Alice Welling before 1516, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 4 November 1572, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Tolland, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wolcott Sr. est né environ 1500, à Tolland, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Wolcott, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Whetchill, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Alice Welling avant 1516, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 4 novembre 1572, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Tolland, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Wolcott Sr. um 1500 in Tolland, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wolcott 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Whetchill 23. Er hat vor 1516 in Somerset, England Margaret Alice Welling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 4. November 1572 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tolland, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wolcott Sr. è nato il circa 1500 nel Tolland, Somerset, England, il suo padre, William Wolcott, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Whetchill, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Alice Welling prima del 1516, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 4 novembre 1572, nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Tolland, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wolcott Sr.が約1500年にイギリスソメルセトトランドで生まれた時，父William Wolcottは27歳，母Elizabeth Whetchillは23歳であった。1516年以前にイギリスソメルセトでMargaret Alice Wellingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1572年11月4日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトトランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wolcott Sr.(이)가 대략 1500년 영국 서머세트 톨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wolcott(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Whetchill(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1516년 이전 영국 서머세트에서 Margaret Alice Welling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1572년 11월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 톨랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wolcott Sr. nasceu aproximadamente 1500, em Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Wolcott, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Whetchill, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Alice Welling antes 1516, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 4 de novembro de 1572, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wolcott Sr. родился около 1500 г. в местности толланд, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William Wolcott было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Whetchill, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Alice Welling перед 1516 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 4 ноября 1572 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности толланд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Wolcott Sr. nació aproximadamente 1500, en Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William Wolcott, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Whetchill, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Alice Welling antes de 1516, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 4 de noviembre de 1572, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
